roots: fart 放屁 + -ing 動作或名詞形式
ex1En: It is rude to fart loudly in public.
ex1Zh: 在公共場合大聲放屁是不禮貌的。
ex2En: He said sorry after farting in class.
ex2Zh: 他在課堂上放屁後道歉。

ex1En: Please say excuse me after you burp.
ex2En: The baby burped after drinking milk.
ex2Zh: 寶寶喝完牛奶後打了嗝。

roots: pick 挑、挖 + one's nose 某人的鼻子
ex1En: Do not pick your nose in public.
ex1Zh: 不要在公共場合挖鼻孔。
ex2En: The teacher told him not to pick his nose.
ex2Zh: 老師告訴他不要挖鼻孔。

roots: tap 輕敲、輕拍 + one's foot 某人的腳
ex1En: She tapped her foot while waiting.
ex2En: He taps his foot when he feels nervous.

roots: cut 插入、切入 + in line 在隊伍中
ex1En: It is not polite to cut in line.
ex2En: Please wait your turn and do not cut in line.

roots: pick 挑、剔 + one's teeth 某人的牙齒
ex1En: He used a toothpick to pick his teeth.
ex2En: It is better to pick your teeth quietly.

roots: no 禁止 + spitting 吐痰
ex1En: A sign in the station says no spitting.
ex1Zh: 車站裡的標誌寫著禁止吐痰。
ex2En: No spitting keeps public places clean.
ex2Zh: 禁止吐痰能讓公共場所保持乾淨。

roots: litter 亂丟垃圾 + -ing 行為或活動
ex1Zh: 亂丟垃圾會讓公園變髒。
ex2En: Students should stop littering at school.
ex2Zh: 學生應該停止在學校亂丟垃圾。
